an00:1.0.1: Thus have I heard. On one occasion the Blessed One was dwelling at Sāvatthī in Jeta's Grove, Anāthapiṇḍika's Park. There the Blessed One addressed the bhikkhus: "Bhikkhus!""Venerable sir!" those bhikkhus replied. The Blessed One said this:
an00:1.0.2: "Bhikkhus, I do not see even one other form that so obsesses the mindof a man as the form of a woman. The form of a woman obsesses the mind of a man."
